According to the letter, data on how much electricity data centers are consuming is "essential for accurate grid planning and […]

items.title: EcoFlow 48-hour flash sale drops 2,048Wh, 4,096Wh, and 6,144Wh power stations to the second-best prices from $749
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Spring Sale event that ends with the month, as well as the parallel Monthly EcoCredits Madness member sale for two days only, EcoFlow has launched another 48-hour flash sale with up to 62% discounts on power stations and a solar panel bundle at their second-lowest and lowest direct prices. The smallest of the included stations is the DELTA 3 Max Portable Power Station that comes with a FREE waterproof protective bag at $749 shipped, matching its current Amazon pricing without the bag. It’s down from a $1,499 MSRP direct from the brand, though we never see it peak above $1,199 at Amazon. Things have been keeping steady around $799 in 2026, with occasional falls to $749, like today’s deal that repeats the $450 markdown off the going rate ($750 off the MSRP) for the second-lowest price we have tracked, just $50 above the low last spotted during Black Friday and Cyber Monday sales. Head below to learn more and see the full lineup of 48-hour flash savings.

items.title: Lenovo’s budget-friendly Android Idea Tab with stylus and folio case is down to $180, more from $90
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Big Spring Sale, Amazon is now offering Lenovo’s Idea Tab Android tablet bundled with both the stylus and folio case for $179.99 shipped. This budget-friendly model typically goes for $250, so you’re looking at a $70 discount here, which makes it even easier on your wallet. We’ve seen the 4GB RAM and 128GB storage variant go on sale plenty of times in the past – including a current $150 deal at Best Buy – but discounts on this higher-spec model have been far less common. Today’s offer brings this configuration to within $10 of its all-time low, making it a particularly solid value when you factor in that it includes both the stylus and the folio case right in the box. And the fact that it’s only $30 more than the base variant makes it a pretty good option to consider.

items.title: Acer’s Chromebook Plus Spin 714 touchscreen 2-in-1 with Google AI is down to its lowest price at $270 off
items.summary:
While Best Buy isn’t running a competing sale event like Amazon’s Big Spring Sale right now, the retailer has still been rolling out some notable discounts over the last few days. Today, it’s offering Acer’s Chromebook Plus Spin 714 touchscreen 2-in-1 for $529 shipped. This model originally carried a $699 price tag and has more recently been selling for around $799, so you’re looking at a solid $270 discount from its usual going rate. This offer brings it back down to the lowest price it briefly hit last month for the first time, when it dipped to $529 for just a day as part of the retailer’s Deals of the Day offers. It’s back to that all-time low once again today, making this a great time to cash in and snag one if you’re looking to buy a reliable everyday laptop.

more…
